Extension

GitHub - continue-revolution/sd-webui-segment-anything: Segment Anything for Stable Diffusion WebUI
GitHub - Physton/sd-webui-prompt-all-in-one: This is an extension based on sd-webui, aimed at improving the user experience of the prompt/negative prompt input box. It has a more intuitive and powerful input interface function, and provides automatic translation, history record, and bookmarking functions. 这是一个基于 sd-webui 的扩展，旨在提高提示词/反向提示词输入框的使用体验。它拥有更直观、强大的输入界面功能，它提供了自动翻译、历史记录和收藏等功能。
GitHub - AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui-rembg: Removes backgrounds from pictures. Extension for webui.
GitHub - pkuliyi2015/multidiffusion-upscaler-for-automatic1111: Tiled Diffusion and VAE optimize, licensed under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0
GitHub - fkunn1326/openpose-editor: Openpose Editor for AUTOMATIC1111's stable-diffusion-webui
GitHub - DominikDoom/a1111-sd-webui-tagcomplete: Booru style tag autocompletion for AUTOMATIC1111's Stable Diffusion web UI
GitHub - deforum-art/sd-webui-deforum: Deforum extension for AUTOMATIC1111's Stable Diffusion webui
GitHub - zanllp/sd-webui-infinite-image-browsing: A fast and powerful image/video browser for Stable Diffusion webui / ComfyUI / Fooocus / NovelAI, featuring infinite scrolling and advanced search capabilities using image parameters. It also supports standalone operation.
GitHub - lobehub/sd-webui-lobe-theme: 🅰️ Lobe theme - The modern theme for stable diffusion webui, exquisite interface design, highly customizable UI, and efficiency boosting features.

Silicon Labs Host Libraries: END-USER LICENSE AGREEMENT
Single-Chip HID USB to SMBus Master Bridge CP2112 Data Sheet
CP2112-EK-QS-Guide.pdf
AN721: USBXpress™ Device Configuration and Programming Guide
AN496: HID USB-to-SMBus API Specification
an495-cp2112-interface-specification.pdf
CP2112 Address issue
CP2112 Receive ACK/NACK for each byte written
nickdademo/cp2112_demo: Demo code for reading SMBus battery parameters using the Silicon Labs CP2112 board.
louisopen/HY3118withCP2112EK: 24bit ADC convert of the utility via USB. (HY3118 with CP2112EK board) 好東西!
DwyerInstruments/TI_FuelGaugeProgrammer: Programs firmware into a TI Lithium-ion fuel gauge such as the BQ27542.
Mictronics/bqev23k: A project that controls the Texas Instruments (TI) EV2300 hardware interface through C# WPF. Especially written for the BQ40Z80 (2-Series to 7-Series battery pack manager with impedance track gas gauge).
airbiscuity/RPI-BQ27441-Python-Set-Capacity-Energy-Term-Voltage: A python3 script for Raspberry Pi using I2C to set the design capacity, design energy and termination voltage of a BQ27441-G1 fuel gauge. Most of this code was from a person called Arthur Santos that posted it up on the TI Texas Instruments Forums. I've slightly modified the code so it works in setting all the values, some of the changes I made were from looking a C code developed by "Chintan", however I've never been able to get his code to actually update these parameters (it looks like it does write all the data... but for some reason it doesn't). Hopefully this will be of assistance to others as there's actually very little Python/Python3 code out there for using these BQ27441-G1 controllers with Raspberry Pi's!

OCR

GitHub - mchehab/zbar: ZBar is an open source software suite for reading bar codes from various sources, including webcams. As its development stopped in 2012, I took the task of keeping it updated with the V4L2 API. This is the main repository for it. There's a clone at at LinuxTV.org, and another one at gitlab.
GitHub - JaidedAI/EasyOCR: Ready-to-use OCR with 80+ supported languages and all popular writing scripts including Latin, Chinese, Arabic, Devanagari, Cyrillic and etc.
